title: Enphase Energy Q1 2024 Earnings Summary
text: Enphase reported Q1 2024 revenue of $263.3 million, down significantly from the prior quarter, and shipped approximately 1.4 million microinverters and 75.5 megawatt hours of batteries while generating $41.8 million in free cash flow. The non-GAAP gross margin was 46%, down from 50.3% in Q4 2023, primarily due to lower net IRA benefits and reduced volume. For Q2 2024 guidance, the company expected revenue of $290-$330 million, battery shipments of 100-120 megawatt hours, and non-GAAP gross margin of 44-47% with IRA benefit. Management indicated Q1 represented the bottom quarter, with modest recovery signals beginning to emerge. The company undershipped to end-customer demand by $113 million in Q1 and planned approximately $90 million in Q2. U.S. revenue declined 34% sequentially, with California sell-through falling 30%, while Europe surged 70% sequentially with strong momentum in Germany, France, and Netherlands. Half of California installations now utilized NEM 3.0 systems with over 90% battery attachment rates.
